# Deliver App Summary — CRISPR-Test-002 (Focus-Group Session Documentation)

> **Stub.** Used by skills downstream of `pdd-to-deliver-app` (e.g., `app-test`, `connect-opp-setup`) to know the shape of the Deliver app. The actual app is generated by Nova at run time from the PDD's Deliver App Specification.
>
> **Archetype:** `focus-group`. This is a **session documentation app**, not a per-beneficiary form. See `skills/pdd-to-deliver-app/SKILL.md` `## Archetypes` → `focus-group` for the brief structure.

## App overview

- **Name:** Vaccine Hesitancy Focus Group Session Form
- **Type:** Deliver (CommCare data collection app)
- **Target user:** TestLand Health Partners trained facilitators (must have completed the Learn app first)
- **Delivery unit:** One completed focus-group session
- **Case management:** Per-segment, not per-participant. One case per segment ("Women, close to PHC, under-vaccinated children" / "Men, remote, mixed status"). Each case accumulates 3 session deliveries.

## Forms

### 1. Session start

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Date | date | yes | Auto-default to today |
| GPS coordinate | gps | yes | Auto-captured |
| Venue name | text | yes | |
| Segment | select-one | yes | Maps to segment-level case |
| Target participant count | integer | yes | Pre-filled from PDD (8) |
| Actual participant count | integer | yes | |
| Per-participant consent confirmation | repeat group, integer 1..n | yes | One row per participant; cannot proceed without all consenting |
| Audio recording start time | datetime | yes | |

### 2. Per-domain summary (×6, one per question domain)

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Domain name | display-only | — | Pre-populated: "Service delivery experience" / etc. |
| Themes | paragraph (long text) | yes | 2–4 sentences expected |
| Notable quotes | repeat group, paragraph + attribution | yes | ≥ 2 verbatim quotes per domain (Hausa with English gloss) |
| Level of consensus | select-one | yes | strong consensus / mixed / divided |
| Time spent (minutes) | integer | yes | |

### 3. Session end

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Facilitator reflection | paragraph | yes | What went well, what didn't, anything surprising |
| Attendance photo | image upload | yes | Group photo, faces visible only with consent |
| Audio file | file upload | yes | Stored in opportunity GDrive folder |
| Total session duration | integer (minutes) | yes | Should be ≥ 45 |

## Verification checkpoints (drive Connect verification rules in `connect-opp-setup`)

- Session start form complete with all consent rows
- All 6 per-domain summary forms submitted
- Session end form complete with all 3 file uploads
- Total session duration ≥ 45 minutes
- GPS within target community area for the segment

## Notable structural differences from atomic-visit Deliver apps

- **One case per segment, not per beneficiary.** No participant-level case lifecycle.
- **File uploads (audio, photo) are first-class evidence**, not optional attachments.
- **Free-text fields are paragraph-length**, not short text. Themes and quotes need real space.
- **Per-domain summary form repeats 6×** in the same session — reflects the PDD's 6 question domains.
- **No skip logic between participants** — there is no per-participant form to skip.
